plan.objective: Failed buildNextView calls retry once with repair overrides instead of failing the run
acceptanceCriteria: A failed buildNextView retries exactly once with repair overrides applied
Existing behavior unchanged when the first build succeeds
constraints: No changes to the public executor API

tasks.title: Add repair override schema and store
tasks.context: Plan section 2: overrides are a typed map keyed by failure class. Define the schema and an in-memory store that T2 and T3 build against. Interface task — done serially before fan-out.

tasks.title: Wrap buildNextView in repairable executor
tasks.context: Plan section 3: on first failure, look up overrides by failure class (T1 store) and retry once. Write the failing test first: assert exactly one retry on failure, zero on success. Do not touch src/repair/*.
doneWhen: One retry on failure, zero retries on success
tasks.lastFailure: Attempt 1 retried twice on double failure; off-by-one in retry guard. Next attempt: count attempts, not failures.

tasks.title: Add regression tests for one-retry repair path
tasks.context: Plan section 4: integration-level coverage — success path, single-failure-then-repair path, double-failure path. Builds on the T1 schema only; independent of T2 internals.
doneWhen: Three integration cases pass or fail for the right reasons

tasks.title: Integration gate: full suite and acceptance check
tasks.context: Run plan-level verificationCommands and confirm each acceptance criterion explicitly before close-out.
